headline: Ulta (ULTA) Gained from New Leadership
summary: Brown Advisory, an investment management company, released its “Brown Advisory Mid-Cap Growth Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy lagged the Russell Midcap® Growth Index in the fourth quarter due to stock selection. The performance was in line with expectations for the full year. The firm believes […]

headline: American Airlines elects Mary Dillon to its board of directors
summary: Mary Dillon American Airlines Group Inc. today announced that Mary Dillon has been elected to the company’s board of directors. FORT WORTH, Texas, March 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- American Airlines Group Inc. (NASDAQ: AAL) today announced that Mary Dillon has been elected to the company’s board of directors.
